lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਡੁਬੇ ਸਗਲੇ ਕੁਲ ਡੋਬੇ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aap ddube sagale kul ddobe koorr bol bikh khaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: They drown themselves, and drown their entire family; speaking lies, they eat poison. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਕੂੜਿ ਲਾਗੇ ਕੂੜੇ ਫਲ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eik koorr laage koorre fal paae |
lines.english: Some are stuck in falsehood, and false are the rewards they receive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae birathaa janam gavaae |
lines.english: In love with duality, they waste away their lives in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤਿ ਜਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਸੋਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhaae bhagat jaa haumai sokhai |
lines.english: Through loving devotion, their ego evaporates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਤਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਨੁ ਕੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦੇਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: eis tan meh man ko guramukh dekhai |
lines.english: How rare are those who, as Gurmukh, look within their bodies, into their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰਤਾ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aap karaae karataa soee |
lines.english: The Creator Himself inspires us to work;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਮੋਨਿਧਾਰੀ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ਤਿਨ ਭੀ ਤਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਨੁ ਨ ਦਿਖਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sidh saadhik monidhaaree rahe liv laae tin bhee tan meh man na dikhaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: The Siddhas, the seekers and the silent sages continually, lovingly focus their consciousness, but they have not seen the mind within the body. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰੁ ਕਿ ਕਰੇ ਕੀਤੈ ਕਿਆ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: hor ki kare keetai kiaa hoee |
lines.english: what can anyone else do? What can be done by our doing?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਸੋ ਲੇਵੈ ਨਾਮੋ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੨੩॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: naanak jis naam devai so levai naamo man vasaavaniaa |8|23|24|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord bestows His Name; we receive it, and enshrine it within the mind. ||8||23||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਅਲਖ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis vich vasai har alakh apaaraa |
lines.english: Within this cave, the Invisible and Infinite Lord abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਗੁਫਾ ਮਹਿ ਅਖੁਟ ਭੰਡਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eis gufaa meh akhutt bhanddaaraa |
lines.english: Within this cave, there is an inexhaustible treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਆਪੁ ਵੰਞਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape gupat paragatt hai aape gurasabadee aap vanyaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: He Himself is hidden, and He Himself is revealed; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, selfishness and conceit are eliminated. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree amrit naam man vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who enshrine the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord, within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਮੀਠਾ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam mahaa ras meetthaa guramatee amrit peeaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The taste of the Ambrosial Naam is very sweet! Through the Guru's Teachings, drink in this Ambrosial Nectar. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਬਜਰ ਕਪਾਟ ਖੁਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar bajar kapaatt khulaaeaa |
lines.english: Subduing egotism, the rigid doors are opened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਕੋਈ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai naam na paae koee gur kirapaa man vasaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Without the Shabad, the Naam is not obtained. By Guru's Grace, it is implanted within the mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮੋਲਕੁ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naam amolak gur parasaadee paaeaa |
lines.english: The Priceless Naam is obtained by Guru's Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੇਰੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: antar chaanan agiaan andher gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Deep within, the Divine Light has dawned, and the darkness of ignorance has been dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਜਨੁ ਸਚੁ ਨੇਤ੍ਰੀ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur giaan anjan sach netree paaeaa |
lines.english: The Guru has applied the true ointment of spiritual wisdom to my eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲੀ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jotee jot milee man maaniaa har dar sobhaa paavaniaa |3|
lines.english: My light has merged into the Light; my mind has surrendered, and I am blessed with Glory in the Court of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਧੇ ਸੂਝੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਘਿਰਿ ਆਇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਥੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: manamukh andhe soojhai naahee fir ghir aae guramukh vath paavaniaa |4|
lines.english: The blind, self-willed manmukhs do not understand; but when they return once again to their own home, then, as Gurmukh, they find the genuine article. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰੀਰਹੁ ਭਾਲਣਿ ਕੋ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sareerahu bhaalan ko baahar jaae |
lines.english: Those who look outside the body, searching for the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਲਹੈ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਵੇਗਾਰਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: naam na lahai bahut vegaar dukh paae |
lines.english: Shall not receive the Naam; they shall instead be forced to suffer the terrible pains of slavery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: man tan vekhai haumai mail jaae |
lines.english: Within your mind and body, see the Lord, and the filth of egotism shall depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਸਚਾ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee sachaa har paae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the True Lord is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੈਸਿ ਸੁਥਾਨਿ ਸਦ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bais suthaan sad har gun gaavai sachai sabad samaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: Sitting in that place, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord forever, and be absorbed in the True Word of the Shabad. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਦਰ ਠਾਕੇ ਧਾਵਤੁ ਰਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: nau dar tthaake dhaavat rahaae |
lines.english: Those who close off the nine gates, and restrain the wandering mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਥੈ ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦ ਵਜਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: othai anahad sabad vajeh din raatee guramatee sabad sunaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: There, the Unstruck Melody of the Shabad vibrates day and night. Through the Guru's Teachings, the Shabad is heard. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸਵੈ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: dasavai nij ghar vaasaa paae |
lines.english: come to dwell in the Home of the Tenth Gate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਹਥਿ ਕੁੰਜੀ ਹੋਰਤੁ ਦਰੁ ਖੁਲੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: satigur hath kunjee horat dar khulai naahee gur poorai bhaag milaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: The key is in the hands of the True Guru; no one else can open this door. By perfect destiny, He is met. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਵਸਤੁ ਲਹੈ ਨ ਚੂਕੈ ਫੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: n vasat lahai na chookai feraa |
lines.english: The genuine article is not found, and the cycle of reincarnation does not end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਆਨੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai antar aaneraa |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, there is only darkness within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਪਤੁ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਤੂੰ ਸਭਨੀ ਥਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gupat paragatt toon sabhanee thaaee |
lines.english: You are the hidden and the revealed in all places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee mil sojhee paaee |
lines.english: Receiving Guru's Grace, this understanding is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਤੂੰ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੨੪॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: naanak naam salaeh sadaa toon guramukh man vasaavaniaa |8|24|25|
lines.english: O Nanak, praise the Naam forever; as Gurmukh, enshrine it within the mind. ||8||24||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਜੋਹੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਸੰਤਾਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaal na johai dukh na santaape |
lines.english: Death does not see them, and pain does not afflict them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਆਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh milai milaae aape |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs meet the Lord, and inspire others to meet Him as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਬੰਧਨ ਸਭ ਤੋੜੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haumai maar bandhan sabh torrai guramukh sabad suhaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: Subduing egotism, they break all their bonds; as Gurmukh, they are adorned with the Word of the Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree har har naam suhaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who look beautiful in the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਾਵੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਚੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh gaavai guramukh naachai har setee chit laavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs sing, the Gurmukhs dance, and focus their consciousness on the Lord. ||1||Pause||
